meta.title: Shipping Calculator | Eagle Logistics
meta.description: Calculate domestic shipping costs. Compare courier partners and get sample rates from our rate card.

content.title: Calculate Your Shipping Cost
content.subtitle: Enter your parcel details to compare sample rates from multiple courier partners
content.notice: Sample rates from our rate card. Final price depends on zone, partner availability, and parcel type — confirm on WhatsApp for an exact quote.
content.offerReminder: Monsoon Express: mention EAGLE15 on WhatsApp for 15% off domestic shipping (T&C apply).
content.noMatchMessage: We couldn't find a rate for this weight and distance combination. WhatsApp us for a custom quote.
